task.title: Normalize restore status for preset/history refill

requirements.description: After preset or history restore, set statusText to a consistent "Ready to call helloLab." and scroll back to the editor.
acceptance: Preset restore sets statusText to Ready to call helloLab.
History restore sets statusText to Ready to call helloLab.
Preset restore scrolls back to the editor
constraints: Only modify the lab project under G:\codex测试
Do not change any production project files
